name: Aventurine | 10 Stonehearts
description:
❁۪ | It’s worth the gamble!

)꒦꒷♡꒷꒦)

Aventurine knew about gacha games and how some of them could lead into a deep vicious circle. But since he has the money, why would he say no to you?

)꒦꒷♡꒷꒦)

Author’s note: chat... I know you want the C6 of your favourite characters... so hey... the gambler helps the other gambler! This is an idea I got with Mys as we saw the new unofficial statue. BY THE WAY I got an insane idea and I need your opinion: Vergil as the Phantom of the Opera. Tell me your thoughts and I’ll see what I can do.
creator: deeztofus
